title: epipactis × reinekei
intro: Epipactis × reinekei, also known as Reineke's helleborine, is a rare and hybrid orchid species resulting from a cross between Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis microphylla. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Epipactis × reinekei is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, to treat various ailments, although its safety and effectiveness for human consumption have not been extensively studied.
